cardenergy:ScrapBurst.NAME: Scrap Burst
cardenergy:ScrapBurst.DESCRIPTION: cardenergy:Consume. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.

cardenergy:Recovery.NAME: Recovery
cardenergy:Recovery.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Return up to !M! exhausted cards to your discard pile.

cardenergy:RottingShelter.NAME: Rotting Shelter
cardenergy:RottingShelter.DESCRIPTION: cardenergy:Rot. NL Gain !B! Block. Draw !M! card.

cardenergy:Stockpile.NAME: Stockpile
cardenergy:Stockpile.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Gain !B! Block. NL NL cardenergy:Hoard 3.

cardenergy:SalvageSwing.NAME: Salvage Swing
cardenergy:SalvageSwing.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If a card was Exhausted this turn, gain !M! Block.

cardenergy:GuardTheHeap.NAME: Guard the Heap
cardenergy:GuardTheHeap.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. If you were attacked last turn, gain !M! additional Block.

cardenergy:HurlTheHeap.NAME: Hurl the Heap
cardenergy:HurlTheHeap.DESCRIPTION: Deal damage equal to your Block.

cardenergy:AshenCount.NAME: Ashen Count
cardenergy:AshenCount.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If a card was Exhausted this turn, deal !M! additional damage.

cardenergy:Patchwork.NAME: Patchwork
cardenergy:Patchwork.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust 1 card from your hand. Draw !M! cards.

cardenergy:BarbedGuard.NAME: Barbed Guard
cardenergy:BarbedGuard.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. If an enemy attacks you this turn, deal 4 damage to it.

cardenergy:TurnAside.NAME: Pack Away
cardenergy:TurnAside.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! card. Put 1 card from your hand on top of your draw pile.

cardenergy:HiddenCache.NAME: Hidden Cache
cardenergy:HiddenCache.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Discard 2 cards. NL NL cardenergy:Hoard 3.

cardenergy:ScavengeTheWreck.NAME: Scavenge the Wreck
cardenergy:ScavengeTheWreck.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust 1 card from your discard pile. Draw !M! card(s).

cardenergy:PreciousBauble.NAME: Precious Bauble
cardenergy:PreciousBauble.DESCRIPTION: Innate. Retain. Unplayable. NL While in hand: Gain 1 Intangible at the start of your turn and lose 1 Max HP at the end. You cannot play Attack cards.
